prompt: A highly detailed medieval Islamic geometric tilework composition representing increasing complexity, with a central simple symmetrical pattern that progressively expands outward into extremely dense, intricate tessellations. Each outer layer introduces more interlocking polygons and star patterns, becoming visually overwhelming and harder to distinguish. Perfect radial symmetry, precise linework, flat perspective, no depth or shading. Traditional Islamic geometric art style with rich lapis blue, gold, turquoise, and earth tones. Handcrafted ceramic tile texture, subtle imperfections, architectural wall setting. No text, no modern elements, no gradients, no realism
tradition_approach: Used radial symmetry, repeating tessellations, flat geometry, and intricate polygonal expansion to reflect traditional Islamic tilework while mapping increasing dimensional complexity to visual overload
